commit.message:
fix(readme): fix pre-commit hooks and regenerate README/TILES from actual skills (#8)

* fix(readme): fix lefthook sync hooks and regenerate README/TILES from actual skills

- Fix lefthook.yml: move readme-sync, yamllint, shellcheck, tessl-lint
  into the commands block (were incorrectly nested at pre-commit level
  and never ran)
- Widen readme-sync trigger glob from .context/audits/*.md to
  {skills/**,cli/**,.context/audits/**} so it fires on any skill change
- Add TILES.md to the files regenerated and staged by readme-sync
- Fix tile-parser to skip private child tiles when parent dir has a
  tile.json (prevents opencode sub-skills appearing as 9 separate tiles)
- Fix trailing double newline in generated README.md causing MD012 errors
- Add languages domain to domain-config.ts for future skill discoverability
- Regenerate README.md and TILES.md: now accurately reflects 48 tiles

* Potential fix for pull request finding

commit.message:
Fix: stack overflow - use real stack limits in emscripten_stack_get_end/base/current (v3.9)

Stack cookie was being written to address 4 because _emscripten_stack_get_end()
returned 0 (our no-op stub). This caused immediate 'Stack overflow' abort since
malloc/init code overwrites those low addresses.

From index.js constants:
  ___stack_pointer initial = 5682304 (stack base/top)
  ___stack_low = 439424 (stack end/bottom)

Now _emscripten_stack_get_end returns 439424 (real stack bottom)
_emscripten_stack_get_base returns 5682304 (real stack top)
_emscripten_stack_get_current returns 5682304 (initial = stack top)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: stub resolveSymbol + callNativeFunction missing exports (v3.8)

Two new crash points past the GOT stub phase:
1. resolveSymbol() asserted on runtime calls to missing symbols
   (_ZNSt3__218shared_timed_mutexC1Ev etc) - now returns no-op fn
2. callNativeFunction() asserted on missing WASM exports like strerror
   - now returns no-op fn instead of aborting

These cover runtime dynamic symbol resolution after module init,
separate from the pre-init GOT checks already patched in v3.5.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix: no-op fallbacks for all 8 emscripten_stack_* functions (v3.7)

index.wasm on Cloudflare is missing emscripten stack exports. Patched
all assignments to fall back to safe no-ops (return 0 or no-op void)
so stackCheckInit/writeStackCookie don't crash with 'not a function'.
Stack overflow detection is disabled but game can proceed.

commit.message:
fix: harden cron engine against silent crashes (closes #15) (#18)

* fix: harden cron engine against silent crashes on unhandled rejections

- Add uncaughtException/unhandledRejection global handlers to log errors
  instead of letting Node.js 22 silently terminate the process
- Add .catch() on fire-and-forget dispatch() calls to prevent floating
  promise rejections from escaping the tick loop
- Add tick-loop watchdog (30s check, 60s stall threshold) that detects
  and resets a stalled tick interval
- Add circuit breaker in lifecycle.mjs: auto-disable jobs after 10
  consecutive transient failures to prevent infinite timeout cascades
- Log Node.js version on engine startup for diagnostics

Closes #15

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore: bump registry to 0.11.1 and cron to 0.1.4

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: stub ALL undefined symbols instead of pattern-matching (v3.5)

Whack-a-mole pattern of one new symbol per deploy (__cxa_atexit,
_ZTVN..., __cxa_pure_virtual, _ZTHN..., stderr) ends here.

Replace the narrow regex stub with a catch-all: any symbol that is
undefined after module load gets stubbed as 1 with a console warning
instead of aborting. The game was built without EMCC_FORCE_STDLIBS=1
so the side module has many stdlib symbols that the main module does
not export - stubbing them is the correct runtime workaround.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: add _headers for COOP/COEP + bump SW cache to v8 (v3.4)

ROOT CAUSE: Cloudflare Pages was not sending Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy
and Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy headers. Without these:
- SharedArrayBuffer is blocked (required for WASM threading)
- Thread-local symbols like _ZTHN fail to resolve
- Browser HTTP-caches index.js, serving stale unpatched versions

Fixes:
- _headers: COOP/COEP for all routes, no-cache for HTML/JS files
- sw.js: bump cache to v8 to evict all stale cached WASM/PCK assets
- index.html: v3.4 version stamp

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Preserve Dapr configuration on container app deployment (#7062)

* Initial plan

* Fix: preserve Dapr configuration during container app deployment

Co-authored-by: spboyer <7681382+spboyer@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: improve Dapr preservation error handling and add 404 test

- Handle 404 (first deploy) explicitly in persistSettings instead of
  swallowing all errors — proceed without persisting when app does not
  exist yet
- Fail on non-404 errors when Dapr preservation is needed to prevent
  silent config wipe (correctness-critical path)
- Add test for first-deploy scenario (GET 404) verifying no Dapr
  config is injected
- Fix pre-existing cspell issues (projectpkg, agentserver)
- Apply go fix modernizations (to.Ptr -> new)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

commit.message:
Add Phase 8 governance hardening tests

Add four test files in Tests/OracleOSTests/Governance/:

- NoBypassExecutionTests: Verifies browser automation, host automation,
  recovery strategies, and tools do not call executionDriver.execute directly.
- AgentLoopBoundaryTests: Boundary tests ensuring AgentLoop stays under
  150 lines and doesn't contain plan scoring, memory routing, graph updates,
  architecture analysis, or experiment comparison logic.
- PlannerBoundaryTests: Ensures Planner doesn't resolve UI targets, mutate
  files, execute commands, or inline recovery mechanics.
- KnowledgePromotionTests: Tests GraphPromotionPolicy, WorkflowPromotionPolicy,
  MemoryDecayPolicy, and WorkflowConfidenceModel behaviors.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Phase 7 evaluation upgrade task suites

Add five new eval task benchmark files for Phase 7:
- AmbiguousUITasks: ambiguous submit buttons, nav links, form fields, close buttons
- DialogStormTasks: permission, save-before-close, update notification storms
- RecoveryLoopTasks: focus loss, stale observation, modal reappear recovery
- PatchFailureTasks: wrong file, build break, test regression patch recovery
- WorkflowDriftTasks: layout change, renamed element, new step required drift

Extend EvalTaskFamily enum with five new cases: ambiguousUI, dialogStorm,
recoveryLoop, patchFailure, workflowDrift.

All files adapted to the actual EvalTask(name:family:runs:executeRun:) API,
using AgentLoop fixtures or RecoveryPlanner as appropriate.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix: expand RTTI stub regex to cover _ZTH/_ZTW thread-local symbols (v3.3)

Aborted: undefined symbol '_ZTHN12MessageQueue16thread_singletonE'
_ZTHN prefix = C++ thread-local init helper, not covered by old regex.
Added ^_ZTH and ^_ZTW to stub pattern so TLS singleton symbols are skipped.
Also includes v3.2 getMemory guard (GOT[__heap_base] null check).

commit.message:
Fix: guard GOT[__heap_base] in getMemory to prevent undefined crash (v3.2)

TypeError: Cannot set properties of undefined (setting 'value') in getMemory.
The unguarded GOT[__heap_base].value=end write crashes when GOT entry
is not yet populated. Added null check before assignment.

commit.message:
Fix LinkError: add env Proxy for main WASM missing C++ imports

WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming fails with:
  Import #0 'env' '__cxa_atexit': function import requires a callable

The main WASM (index.wasm) imports C++ stdlib functions like
__cxa_atexit that are not present in getWasmImports() because
the build lacked EMCC_FORCE_STDLIBS=1.

Fix: wrap info.env with a Proxy so any missing import key returns
a no-op function (or wasmTable for __indirect_function_table).

commit.message:
Replace index.js with fresh patched version from original itch.io download

Fresh index.js (4MB, different Emscripten version) with 3 patches:

1. reportUndefinedSymbols: stub unresolvable C++ ABI symbols
   (_ZTV*, _ZTI*, _ZTS*, _ZTT*, __cxa_*, __gxx_*, __dso_handle)
   instead of calling abort(). These are missing because the build
   lacked EMCC_FORCE_STDLIBS=1.

2. loadWebAssemblyModule async path: replace sync
   new WebAssembly.Instance(binary, info) with
   await WebAssembly.instantiate(_mod, info) + 6-attempt retry
   loop that grows wasmTable when table-size errors occur.
   Fixes Chrome's 8MB sync instantiation limit for index.side.wasm.

3. getMemory: guard GOT['__heap_base'] initialization to prevent
   TypeError when setting .value on undefined GOT entry.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Replace Unicode symbols with ASCII in console output

Fixes UnicodeEncodeError on Windows cp1252 consoles. Print statements
in md2svg.py used Unicode chars (✓, ⚠, 📊) that fail on non-UTF-8
terminals. Replaced with ASCII equivalents ([ok], [!], [chart]).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: md2pdf
repository.description: Markdown → styled HTML + PDF converter with inline chart generation from YAML data blocks

commit.message:
Fix undefined C++ RTTI vtable symbols aborting Emscripten startup

reportUndefinedSymbols aborted with assertion failure for
_ZTVN10__cxxabiv120__si_class_type_infoE and similar C++ RTTI
vtable symbols (_ZTV*, _ZTI*, _ZTS*, _ZTT*) that are not resolved
because the MAIN_MODULE was not built with EMCC_FORCE_STDLIBS=1.

Patch: stub unresolvable C++ ABI symbols with entry.value=1 instead
of asserting. These vtables are only used for C++ exceptions/RTTI
dynamic_cast which Godot typically disables at compile time.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix side WASM using sync instantiation blocked on main thread (>8MB)

Replaced new WebAssembly.Instance(_mod, info) with
await WebAssembly.instantiate(_mod, info) in loadWebAssemblyModule
retry loop. Chrome blocks synchronous instantiation for modules
over 8MB - index.side.wasm is 39MB so this was always going to fail.

Also verified: no other unguarded GOT value writes exist.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

File-specific helpers (parseSlowmode, formatSlowmode, roleHierarchyCheck,
resolveRole) are preserved in their respective files.

* fix: address PR review comments on vFocus and weekSwipeLeft

- vFocus: type parameter as HTMLElement, guard select() call to support
  textarea and non-text inputs without throwing
- WeekView weekSwipeLeft: compute next-Monday date inside onTrigger (not
  at render time) so long-running sessions never snooze to a stale date

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(session): guard async busy lock with pcall to prevent permanent deadlock (#21)

All three async.void functions (select_tool, select_session, rename_session)
called the inner _() function bare. If ui_select or ui_input (both async.wrap
callbacks) threw a runtime error, state.busy would remain true permanently,
deadlocking the plugin until Neovim restart.

- Replace bare _() with pcall(_) in select_tool, select_session, rename_session
- Ensure state.busy = false always executes on both success and error paths
- Notify the user with [aiwaku] prefixed ERROR message when an unexpected error occurs
- Add missing ---@async annotation to select_session and rename_session

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: aiwaku.nvim

commit.message:
feat: add inter-agent communication skill (agent handshake protocol) (#17)

* feat: add inter-agent communication skill (agent handshake protocol)

Implements the Agent Handshake Protocol as a procedural skill that teaches
genesis-derived agents how to establish bidirectional communication via
Dev Tunnels and the Responses API.

Six-phase protocol: verify infrastructure, test browser bridge, authenticate
via Entra ID SSO, send introduction with mutual discovery, parse response,
and create persistent contact skill for future sessions.

Closes #16

commit.message:
feat: create complete Lit-based frontend for IxUI application

Add all frontend components built with Lit web components and Tailwind CSS v4:
- index.html: SPA entry point with loading spinner
- services/api.js: API client for all backend endpoints
- app.js: Main shell with auth, routing, and layout
- login-dialog.js: Login form with error handling
- nav-menu.js: Sidebar navigation with unit info
- front-page.js: Dashboard with interfaces overview and bitrates
- interfaces-page.js: Interface table with expandable config/services
- routes-page.js: Sortable routes table with HLS badges
- settings-page.js: Editable settings form with save
- network-page.js: Network status with auto-refresh
- commands-page.js: System commands with confirmation dialogs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
